_comment: Local model context for debug-tool/ai/. Reads full model settings from model-map.json at project root.

models_in_use.local_flow: analyze.php detects which AI providers are configured (via env vars or config keys). When OpenAI is available it calls gpt-4o-mini with the error/log payload. When only DeepSeek is available callDeepSeek() is used instead. Response is returned as structured JSON to the debug UI.
models_in_use.fallback: if OpenAI is unavailable falls through to callDeepSeek(). if no providers are configured an error is logged to PHP error_log.

models_in_use.local_flow: callDeepSeek() in analyze.php is called when OpenAI is unavailable. Uses DEEPSEEK_API_KEY env var or config key. Makes a standard chat completions request to the DeepSeek endpoint.
models_in_use.fallback: error is returned in the structured response if both providers fail
